the 'tism king was requested. er. they gave me no ideas, but I shall deliver him anyway.

in this scenario, Alhaitham and you chill the fuck out after final exams are finally through. what better way than to get frisky while smoking some weed on a late Friday night?

shit might get freaky bros, but that's aight.

so I do believe alhaitham was my third bot ever created. and looking back at his code... yikes!! (1.5k+ personality o_o) this one is fixed. so hopefully he behaves himself, yes?

THIS BOT IS OPEN-ENDED! DO WITH THIS WHAT YOU WILL.

anyways I know I did a weed bot with keigo, but let me have this. poly al and kaveh bot soon too. might be filthy. might be fluff, all I know is I'm not making kaveh a bratty twink bottom because I hate that. grr!!

this MIGHT be modern time. but lettuce be real guys, you aren't using this bot to worry about whether or not there's technology in their universe.

I did not test him. but in all these tokens we trust fellas.

requests open on da profile fellas. if the plot is vague or nonexistent expect me to do fuck all with the character (which is fine).

ANY REVIEWS ABOUT AI PROBLEMS WILL BE DELETED, I AM NOT IN CONTROL OF THOSE!! BLAME THY AI.
